mission.title: kgateway: Build Official ARM64 Images - data plane pipeline
mission.description: Build Official ARM64 Images - data plane pipeline. Requested by 30+ users.

steps.title: Check current kgateway deployment
steps.description:
Verify your kgateway version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n kgateway -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kgateway
helm list -n kgateway 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working kgateway installation.

steps.title: Review kgateway configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant kgateway configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n kgateway -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kgateway
kubectl get configmap -n kgateway -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kgateway
```
Build official ARM images for the various kgateway components

ARM compatible images

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
N/A

[Envoy now provides multi-arch images with arm64

steps.title: Apply the fix for Build Official ARM64 Images - data plane pipeline
steps.description:
Addresses #3078 (partially, only 64-bit) and #3486 

Adds the ability to build Gloo on and for ARM64 architectures.

See the fix PR for details: linked PR

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n kgateway -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kgateway
kubectl get events -n kgateway --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Build Official ARM64 Images - data plane pipeline" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Addresses #3078 (partially, only 64-bit) and #3486 

Adds the ability to build Gloo on and for ARM64 architectures.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with kgateway installed or the issue environment reproducible.
